symplectic_closure.reason: dtheta^dtheta=0 kills the 3-form; grad check confirms df/dtheta=(1/4)cos(theta)

contact_non_integrability.reason: alpha^dalpha nowhere zero => genuine contact structure

hopf_projection.reason: Hopf fiber (U(1) orbits) collapse to single S2 point

broken_symplectic_degenerate.reason: cos(theta) vanishes at equator => not a valid symplectic form

broken_contact_integrable.reason: alpha=x1*dx2 has alpha^dalpha=0 everywhere => integrable, not contact

broken_J_not_complex_structure.reason: random matrix fails J^2=-I => not a complex structure

symplectic_at_poles.reason: omega coefficient -> 0 at poles is coordinate artifact, not geometric

contact_near_fiber.reason: d(alpha)(R, R+eps) -> 0 as eps -> 0, confirming R in ker(d(alpha))

kahler_near_poles.reason: Kahler identity holds algebraically even near coordinate singularity
